---
title: "Closing the Gap in Exposure-Response Data: A Pharmaverse Framework"
author:
  - name: "Jeff Dickinson"
description: ""
# Note that the date below will be auto-updated when the post is merged.
date: "2026-04-17"
# Please do not use any non-default categories.
# You can find the default categories in the repository README.md
categories: [Technical]
# Feel free to change the image
image: "pharmaverse_examples.png"

---

<!--------------- typical setup ----------------->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
long_slug <- "2026-04-17-closing-the-gap-in"
```

<!--------------- post begins here ----------------->



<!--------------- appendices go here ----------------->

```{r, echo=FALSE}
source("appendix.R")
insert_appendix(
  repo_spec = "pharmaverse/blog",
  name = long_slug,
  # file_name should be the name of your file
  file_name = list.files() %>% stringr::str_subset(".qmd") %>% first()
)
```
